title: Cobblemon Capsule
description: A capsule-based progression mod for Cobblemon featuring animated openings, new resources, and a dedicated crafting system.
body:
🧩 Cobble Capsule

Cobble Capsule expands the Cobblemon experience with a streamlined capsule progression system, a dedicated crafting workstation, and new resources that push trainers toward fresh goals. Everything is designed to feel native to Cobblemon while giving players more reasons to explore, craft, and experiment.

✨ What the Mod Brings

  • Four capsule families: Combat, Resource, Healing, and Pokémon, each evolving through Basic → Rare → Epic tiers.
  • Distinct particle FX for each tier and capsule category, turning every opening into a quick visual treat.
  • A custom crafting station — the Core Table — to assemble capsules using cores and themed ingredients.
  • Display Case block: showcase any item or block in a slow, continuous rotation — perfect for collections, base decoration, or highlighting rare Cobblemon finds. Powered by Corelite to deliver smooth animated presentation instead of a static item frame.
  • New world material, Corelite: mine it, refine it, and use it to progress into higher capsule tech.
  • Clear audio feedback using tuned vanilla sound cues, with fully custom sounds planned for future versions.
  • Datapack-friendly loot design, letting modpacks rebalance drops or inject new rewards without modifying the mod.
  • Optional mod integration: when installed, Cobblemon Mega Showdown and Cobblemon Utility automatically inject additional themed loot into capsule reward pools — whether in solo worlds or on servers.
  • Built for NeoForge + Cobblemon, with recipe exposure through JEI and other utility mods.

🧪 Early Release Feedback

These first versions of Cobble Capsule are fully functional, but early development means there’s still plenty of room for fine-tuning. I need your help to shape the mod into its best form — every bit of feedback matters.

  • Loot balance: too generous, too stingy, or missing key items?
  • Crafting flow: any recipes feeling off, too expensive, or too cheap?
  • General gameplay feel: progression pacing, capsule usefulness, overall balance.
  • Small details: visual tweaks, QoL improvements, anything that could be cleaner or smoother.
  • Future ideas: capsule themes, systems, features you'd love to see added.

Your insights directly influence the evolution of the mod. Join the Discord to share your feedback, report issues, or suggest new features:

👉 Join the Cobble Capsule Discord

📦 Capsule System Overview

Capsules are consumables containing themed rewards. Each family focuses on a specific aspect of progression:

  • Combat: battle items, power-ups, and tactical gear.
  • Resource: materials, minerals, and base-building supplies.
  • Healing: medicine, cures, and travel-ready support items.
  • Pokémon: random partner Pokémon, with special shiny-oriented rolls.

Higher tiers increase reward quality, reduce duplicates, and unlock exclusive rolls.

Capsule Feedback

  • Tier visuals: subtle sparkles → vibrant bursts → dense, energetic FX.
  • Family identity: each capsule line has its own particle style.
  • Sound cues: snappy timing on crafting and opening actions.

🛠 Core Table Crafting

The Core Table is your capsule assembly station. Drop in a core, add its matching ingredients, power the process with a Corelink Activator, and collect your finished capsule once the crafting pulse completes.

  • Ingredient requirements follow the theme of the capsule family.
  • Progress safely pauses if inputs are removed.
  • Compatible with automation (hoppers, pipes, etc.).

JEI support ensures players can browse all recipes easily.

🌍 World Generation

Corelite is a new mineral line spawning in stone and deepslate layers. Mine shards, refine them into crystals and ingots, and use them for advanced crafting steps — especially capsule cores and progression items.

Corelite uses the same Y range and stone-to-deepslate transition band as diamond ore, so players will naturally find it while following their usual diamond mining routes.

  • Mid-depth ore clusters for natural progression.
  • Shard → Crystal → Ingot processing chain.
  • Includes utility recipes such as Infused Coal.

🧭 Roadmap

  • New capsule families (Fossil, Utility, Seasonal).
  • Configurable crafting speeds and potential upgrades.
  • Deeper Cobblemon integration (NPC vendors, quest hooks).
  • Expanded world-gen points of interest for Corelite.

📣 Support

Need help or want to share feedback?
Found a bug, a balance issue, or something odd happening with your capsules?
Join my Discord and talk directly with me — it’s the fastest way to get support and report problems:

👉 Join the Cobble Capsule Discord

💻 Game Hosting

Need a server for your adventures? Host your world with BisectHosting and use the code OurStory for 25% off your first month. Every purchase helps support the Our Story development.

💖 Support the Project

Want to support my work and access early previews? 👉 Patreon – Our Story Collection
